mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_conversation (user_id, session_id, question, answer, doc_based, create_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{docBased}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_conversation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT session_id, create_time, question FROM ai_conversation WHERE id IN ( SELECT MIN(id) FROM ai_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY session_id ) ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_conversation SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
